faq.question: What currencies do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major currencies through our payment processor, including local payment methods in many regions.

faq.question: Can I get support in Korean?
faq.answer: Our primary support language is English. We're working on expanding Korean support. Email support can handle basic inquiries in Korean.

content.pro_tips:
• Always shoot in RAW format for maximum post-processing flexibility
• Use a lightbox or tent to eliminate harsh reflections and hot spots
• Feature multiple angles — front, side, top-down, and three-quarter views
• Keep backgrounds clean and neutral; white, grey, or soft gradients work best
• Invest in consistent colour calibration so products look identical across channels
